test-case.name: RepairAndDemolish_StacksRemainIndependent

test-case.name: ClearDemolishUndo_ClearsEntireStack
test-case.output: [Placement] Demolished group (1). Refund=20 Stack=1 [Placement] Demolished group (1). Refund=20 Stack=2

test-case.name: DemolishStack_TrimsToThree_LatestOnTop
test-case.output: [Placement] Demolished group (1). Refund=20 Stack=1 [Placement] Demolished group (1). Refund=20 Stack=2 [Placement] Demolished group (1). Refund=20 Stack=3 [Placement] Demolished group (1). Refund=20 Stack=3

test-case.name: SecondDemolish_PushesSecondStackEntry
